title: Bins of Holding
hook: A sorting game where every bin is bigger inside than outside - but the wrong items dropped together explode the bin's volume to zero.
hook_ru: Сортировка, где каждая полка безразмерна внутри - но несовместимые предметы вместе схлопывают её в ноль.
novelty: Sort-by-deduction instead of sort-by-color. Players reverse-engineer the bin compatibility rules via micro-experiments rather than being told upfront.

mutation_of.delta: Hides the rule instead of telling player which color goes where
Replaces capacity puzzle with rule-discovery puzzle
Adds destructive failure mode (detonation) instead of soft-block

design_commitments.win_condition: Complete 3 shifts of 80 items each with bin_losses <= 2 per shift
design_commitments.controls: Drag-drop only, ? for tutorial reopen, discard button
